name: Alexis Leskinen
alt_names: アレクシス・レスキネン
description:
An American professor and senior researcher at Victor Chondria University's Brain Research Institute. He serves as a mentor to Kurisu Makise and Maho Hiyajo. He is well respected in his field and is often described as childlike and friendly by Maho Hiyajo.
~!He works for Stratfor and destroyed the time machine several times directly and indirectly!~

~!He brainwashed Kagari in the future and sent her back in time to contact his past self about the time machine!~
